data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the acceptance workflow requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the acceptance workflow where a substitute can accept or decline a class assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for an acceptance workflow but lacks specific evidence to demonstrate that this requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow where substitutes can accept or decline assignments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the acceptance workflow functionality.
